title: DjupDjup's Kitchen Sink
description: A tech and magic modpack with loads of mods, including server optimisation mods.
body:
# Nearly All the Mods!
## but completely unofilliated with AtMs

This is a NeoForge kitchen sink modpack with a lot of tech mods, a lot of optimisation mods, some magic mods and structures and utility mods.

### Noteable tech mods
- Mekanism
- Create (a lot of mods about create)
- Industrial Foregoing
- AE2
- MineColonies

### Noteable Magic mods
- Thaumon
- Botania (coming soon)
- Vampire
- Werewolf

### Noteable Utilitly mods
- Bluemap
- Discord Link
- Advanced Backups
- Chunky

## Note from the Author
If there are any mods you think this pack needs, please email inf1n1ty.emile@gmail.com and we'll consider it. Do not that the email does not get checked regularly. Hope you enjoy!
